productName: Armosphera A1 Localization RU VAT and e-invoice engine
guardrails: Keep the 2026 general VAT issue rates at 0%, 10%, and 22%, with 2025 20% retained only for back-dated documents.
Keep VAT settlement math rounded to RUB kopecks and avoid floating-point drift in e-invoice totals.
Keep validateEInvoice fail-closed with structured field/code/message errors and no thrown exceptions on malformed input.
Do not add network, filesystem, environment, ЭДО transport, or КЭП signing behavior to the pure localization engines.
Do not change official format/seam comments or rate-year behavior without updating primary-source citations and focused tests.
